mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment_dlq_log (notify_id, out_trade_no, trade_state, retry_count, error_message, raw_body, created_at) VALUES (#{notifyId}, #{outTradeNo}, #{tradeState}, #{retryCount}, #{errorMessage}, #{rawBody}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, notify_id, out_trade_no, trade_state, retry_count, error_message, raw_body, created_at FROM payment_dlq_log WHERE (#{notifyId} IS NULL OR #{notifyId} = '' OR notify_id = #{notifyId}) AND (#{outTradeNo} IS NULL OR #{outTradeNo} = '' OR out_trade_no = #{outTradeNo}) ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
